panels.description: Medium shot: The Spirit of Christmas Past stands tall and spectral, pointing forward. Scrooge, in his nightcap and dressing gown, looks up with a mix of curiosity and hesitation. Ethereal, cold lighting.

bubbles.text: Take heed! Rise! and walk with me!

panels.description: Close up: The Spirit's hand, glowing and translucent, firmly clasps Scrooge's arm. Scrooge recoils slightly, his expression one of involuntary resistance, wearing his night-clothes in a freezing room.

bubbles.text: The grasp, though gentle as a woman's hand, was not to be resisted.

panels.description: Dynamic medium shot: Scrooge touches the Spirit's hand and suddenly gasps in relief, eyes wide. The room around them seems to blur into a supernatural transition. High contrast, magical lighting.

bubbles.text: I am a mortal, and liable to fall.

panels.description: Close up: Scrooge staring intently at the Spirit's face, noticing a single tear on its cheek. The Spirit looks down mildly. Emotional, soft focus.

bubbles.text: Your lip is trembling... what is that upon your cheek?

panels.description: Wide shot: Scrooge and the Spirit walking down a nostalgic, snow-covered country lane at twilight, familiar gates and trees looming in the background. Scrooge looks back with wonder.

bubbles.text: I was born in this place.
